title: Order relative to authorizing the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to establishing a special commission to ensure the safety and sustainability of non-profit public events.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, March 19, 2026 -- The committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by resolve, Senate, No. 1664) of Sal N. DiDomenico to establishing a special commission to ensure the safety and sustainability of non-profit public events, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2890).

actions.description:
Reported from the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
 (under JR10)
Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
